refined_question: How can graph neural networks effectively utilize graph structure to improve performance on node classification tasks with limited labeled nodes, without relying on additional labeling?
intent: Understand methods to mitigate overfitting in graph neural networks for node classification with scarce labels, within the domain of graph learning and semi-supervised learning (SSL), focusing on exploiting graph structure
search_hint: graph neural networks, semi-supervised learning, SSL, graph structure, node classification, limited labels, overfitting mitigation, graph attention, graph convolutional networks, GCNs, graph autoencoders, GAEs, unsupervised graph learning
